title: Little Fish: The Rat Ticklers Need Me
content:
The ad-free version!

Dan, James and Andy discuss YOUR facts, including boneless chicken, lifeless fungi paradoxical frogs. We learn what Anna has in common with Charles Dickens. And we name eight more Friend of the Podcast fact custodians.

Plus, your secret link to access the Lund Comedy Festival presale is:

nosuchthingasafish.com/lund

Hurry before general sale opens at the end of the week!
